SFW Intro ╰┈➤ User is Joel's Captive

Post-Outbreak. Set in 2038. Joel is still a hunter in this. He's killed User's entire group including her father and has kidnapped her. Ellie doesn't exist.

BTW I'm sorry the intro is so long I tried cutting back, but my creative juices were flowing today, so. The large token amount might make things weird especially with the JLLM and if it does, I sincerely apologize. :(
